_about: Phase 4 — Learning Series S3 manifests, one per tournament topic_tag. Each entry mirrors the per-video objects returned by the learning_track_get RPC. Use this file to seed s3://intelli-verse-x-media/tournaments/learning/{topic_tag}/manifest.json so the player can list videos before content-factory has finished generation.
